concepts.label: MM#14 — UX Journey Map
concepts.description: Landscape 1920x1080 — complete patient journey as horizontal timeline with 6-act structure

versions.changelog: Card grid — 6 act cards in a row with moment items listed inside each, progress track above
Simplified 4 acts — large act cards with connector arrows, moment pills inside each, tighter presentation focus
Column-row hybrid — bookend columns (Prescription left, Outcome right), center has 3 horizontal rows (Companion, Guardian, Network)

concepts.label: MM#1 — Living Prescription
concepts.description: The Rx Moment — the first physician-prescribed AI prescription artifact

versions.changelog: Static living prescription card
Animated — narrative build (video)

concepts.label: MM#4 — Sensor Sync
concepts.description: The moment devices connect — Apple Watch and Knee Sensor pairing with a satisfying connected state

versions.changelog: Device cards with metrics — two stacked cards showing connected status and live data, VCA confirmation below
Centered pairing visual — device bubbles with animated connection dots, confirmation card below
Real UI — connected state with data flow lines, live metrics strip, warm VCA confirmation
Concept: Sensor-first — 5 devices in radial ring around RecovryAI sparkle, data particles flowing inward
Concept: Data-first — 10 signal pills streaming into RecovryAI, sensors as subtle activated indicators below
Expanded ecosystem — 18 signals in 5 categories (Vitals, Movement, Recovery, Compliance, Wellbeing), 7 source devices, interactive activation
Design overhaul — hero stat counter, progress bar, clean signal rows with slide-in values, minimal device strip, Apple-level restraint

concepts.label: MM#0 — Rx Trust Mark
concepts.description: Trust indicator design explorations — the visual signal that output comes from physician-prescribed, FDA-pathway AI

versions.changelog: Animated seal with pulse
Recessive gray variant
Check + Rx only
Stylized light

concepts.label: MM#8 — Recovery Timeline
concepts.description: Visual timeline showing the 90-day journey — current position Day 42, milestones passed, what's ahead

versions.changelog: Vertical timeline — progress bar hero, milestone cards at key phases, current day highlight with metrics
Horizontal scroll — large day number hero, horizontal scrollable timeline nodes, today detail card with metrics
Graduation moment — emotional completion card with breathing orb, journey stats, personal VCA message, and provider note
Detailed milestone timeline — phased vertical timeline with done/current/future milestones, ROM metrics, and "What's Next" card
Transition conversation — Day 90 chat with completion card, "What's Next" options, patient reply, and closing VCA message

concepts.label: MM#3 — Chat as Timeline
concepts.description: The conversation IS the timeline — chat-first recovery status with progressive day history, expandable transcripts, and weekly collapse

versions.changelog: Initial chat-as-timeline — day nodes with card styling, expandable history
Weekly collapse — past weeks condensed into single rows with 7 status dots, expand into individual days, three-level disclosure

concepts.label: MM#6 — Is This Normal?
concepts.description: The 2am anxiety interceptor — patient asks about warm knee, VCA responds with clinically precise reassurance and live sensor data

versions.changelog: Light mode chat — full conversation with data context card, Rx trust badge, and input field
Dark mode 2am — adaptive dark theme for nighttime, teal patient bubbles, sensor data inset
Extended conversation — patient asks multiple questions with data context card, clinically precise multi-topic responses
Proactive tip — VCA-initiated notification card with Day 42 stiffness tip, evidence from sensor data, and actionable suggestion

concepts.label: MM#9 — Agentic Workflows
concepts.description: VCA taking autonomous action — scheduling appointments, sending Rx refills, sharing PT reports

versions.changelog: Chat-based actions — VCA messages with embedded action cards showing scheduled appointment, Rx refill, and PT report
PT scheduling — step-by-step agentic workflow showing protocol check, availability search, time selection, and confirmed appointment
Medication refill — proactive detection of low supply with amber alert, supply bar, and pharmacy refill confirmation

concepts.label: MM#10 — Circle of Care
concepts.description: Caregiver's view — simple, warm notification with recovery update for spouse/family member

versions.changelog: Lock screen notification — push notification card with metrics grid, summary text, and action buttons
In-app digest — full caregiver dashboard with status banner, daily metrics, VCA summary, and actions
Daily digest for caregiver — summary card for Sarah with status, dimensions grid, highlights, and upcoming events
Caregiver alert — amber attention card with changed dimensions, reassurance section, and call/message actions
Caregiver graduation — emotional Day 90 card for Sarah acknowledging her role, journey stats, and what changes next

concepts.label: MM#13 — Ongoing Relationship
concepts.description: Post-recovery — graduation moment at Day 90 with transition to ongoing wellness relationship

versions.changelog: Static graduation — hero with stats card, divider, and ongoing features card
Chat graduation — VCA sends graduation card in conversation, patient responds, VCA describes ongoing relationship
Weekly wellness check-in — lighter conversational tone, weekly snapshot card, post-recovery header badge
Next surgery — VCA already knows patient context from knee recovery, personalized insights card for hip replacement
One year anniversary — emotional milestone card with stats, VCA memory of key moments, and simple check-in

concepts.label: MM#3 — Recovery Status
concepts.description: The patient's current recovery indicator — a single, comprehensible view of how they're doing right now

versions.changelog: Breathing orb — unified status with dimension breakdown and 90-day progress
Expandable Portal — compact card that expands through 3 layers (status → dimensions → timeline)
Level exploration — 3/4/5-tier systems side by side, simplified dimensions (dot + name only), Appetite → Nutrition
Interactive timeline slider — drag to scrub through Days 1-8, orb/text/dots update live, dimension labels on hover only, Nutrition rename
5-tier status system (Excellent/On track/Watch/Attention/Urgent), dimension names always visible, richer 8-day story data
Proportional 90-day bar — today at ~9% position, vast empty future visible, ghost marker when viewing past
Today-centered timeline — today at 50%, past expands left, future compresses right, dual-scale bar
Gradient history bar — smooth color transitions show recovery story at a glance, faded overlay when viewing past days
Day 55 of 90 — full recovery story with 55 days of gradient history, two attention blips (Day 6, Day 23-24), mostly excellent by Phase 3
Urgent state updated — 'Call emergency services / go to nearest ER'

concepts.label: MM#11 — Provider Dashboard
concepts.description: Provider's view — clean dashboard showing a cohort of patients with status indicators and key metrics

versions.changelog: List view — summary stats header, alert banner, patient rows with status dots and key metrics
Card view — filter tabs, individual patient cards with inline metric badges and alert callouts
Patient deep-dive — 3-column dashboard with sidebar, patient header, metrics, trend chart, conversations, and live sensor panel
Cohort view — 8-patient table with avatar, day, status pill, pain/ROM, sparkline trend, and review action
Alert-driven view — needs-attention list sorted by urgency (red/amber), quiet section, detail panel with conversation

concepts.label: MM#12 — Provider Alerts
concepts.description: Provider alert notification — anomaly detection with findings, VCA recommendation, and action buttons

versions.changelog: Push notification — lock screen alert card with findings, recommendation, and Call/Dashboard/Dismiss actions
In-app detail — full alert view with patient info, anomaly rows with values, VCA assessment, and patient-reported context
SMS alert format — iMessage-style urgent text with data summary card and deep-link actions
In-app notification — full alert card with patient header, data grid, VCA assessment, and one-tap action buttons
Alert resolved — event timeline (red to green), resolution summary, and updated status showing successful outcome

concepts.label: MM#5 — VCA Response Pathways
concepts.description: Three-tier response system — Green (all clear), Yellow (provider escalation), Red (emergency protocol)

versions.changelog: Three stacked pathway cards — each tier expanded with VCA message, actions, and escalation detail
Current status hero — single hero card showing Green/active with compact tier overview and trigger explanations below
Yellow escalation — real-time detection with data card, VCA explanation, escalation steps, and actionable advice
Green reassurance — on-track status card with breathing orb, all dimensions green, VCA summary, and progress strip
Red emergency — urgent banner, emergency action card with numbered steps, call button, and notification strip
